title: Tree's Cobblemon Adventures
description: Hi! this is a Cobblemon RPG focused modpack built from the ground up for a couple of friends of mine, designed for a mainly casual audience :)
body:
Hi! This is a cobblemon focused modpack, with some added RPG elements such as bosses of mass destruction, simply swords, etc. There's also a heavy emphasis on creative building, and a general cottagecore vibe, so great for making pretty buildings for all your pokemon!

This pack was built in a day but having tested it with friends on a server, it runs quite stable! I will post known bugs inside of version descriptions and try to fix them where possible :)
